title: NCT04556981 Safety and Immunogenicity of  M72/AS01E in Participants With Well-controlled HIV (MESA-TB)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"12iv3","text":"Protocol Title: A randomized, placebo-controlled, observer-blind, phase 2 study to evaluate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2t4d","text":"safety and immunogenicity of the investigational M72/AS01E Mycobacterium tuberculosis (Mtb)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5gn0d","text":"vaccine in virally suppressed, antiretroviral-treated participants with human immunodeficiency","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qoqk","text":"virus (HIV)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ht7o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3b6ic","text":"Short Title: Safety and immunogenicity of a TB vaccine M72/AS01E in participants with well controlled","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"387j5","text":"HIV","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"s9tu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2d6b","text":"Rationale:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b13uu","text":"Published phase 1 and 2 randomized, controlled trials evaluating M72/AS01E vaccination in","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ecaie","text":"individuals with HIV who were receiving antiretroviral therapy (ART) show that a 2-dose","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ac61c","text":"schedule of the vaccine given one month apart is well-tolerated and immunogenic in this","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ejv6q","text":"population. This current study intends to confirm that the vaccine is safe, well-tolerated, and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9tb25","text":"immunogenic in a larger population of people with virally suppressed HIV infection in a","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ff27l","text":"tuberculosis (TB) endemic region.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
